Data Center Solutions, which grew 121% year on year... expected to be a material contributor to SLB's portfolio in the future
underpinned by data platforms and agentic AI orchestration which not only allow customers to realize efficiency gains but also transforms industry workflows through AI

highlighted by strategic collaborations with cross-industry leaders, the launch of the Lumi data and AI platform, new Performance Live centers to enable remote operations, and the achievement of fully autonomous drilling operations

limitations: AI investment intensity scored 4 rather than 5: while Digital revenue is quantified at $2.7B and Data Center Solutions grew 121%, no explicit multi-year AI-specific capex program or dedicated AI R&D budget is disclosed; capital investments for Digital segment ($257M) are stated but not broken out by AI vs. non-AI spend

Narrative concreteness scored 4 rather than 5: autonomous drilling and Lumi platform deployments are described as operational, but no quantified business outcomes (%, $, time saved) are provided for AI-specific use cases

Risk disclosure: excerpts labeled [item_8] and [risk_factors] contain risk-relevant material; AI risks are named (cybersecurity, IP/patent) but mechanisms linking AI risk to specific revenue/compliance impact are not detailed, limiting score to 3
Some promotional language present (e.g., 'uniquely positioned', 'differentiated') — treated as claims, not confirmed outcomes
